NCT04578834.name: APPLAUSE-IgAN
NCT04578834.group: Adults with primary IgAN on RAS blockade, iptacopan 200 mg BID vs placebo (UPCR ratio 9-mo interim primary; eGFR slope 24-mo final primary)

allOutcomes.title: UPCR ratio at month 9 (iptacopan / placebo, geometric mean ratio; interim primary)
Annualised eGFR slope at month 24 (iptacopan minus placebo; mL/min/1.73m^2/year, MD; final primary)

NCT04578834.snippet: Source: Rizk DV et al. N Engl J Med 2024 (APPLAUSE-IgAN, 9-mo interim UPCR primary).

evidence.label: Eligibility (AACT-derived)
evidence.text: AACT-derived (auto-populated 2026-05-04). Sex: ALL; min age 18 Years; max age 100 Years; healthy volunteers: f. CRITERIA: "Inclusion Criteria:~* Male and female patients ≥ 18 years of age with an eGFR level and biopsy-confirmed IgA nephropathy as follows:~* For patients eGFR* ≥ 45ml/min/1.73m2, a qualifying biopsy performed within the last 5 years is required.~* For patients with eGFR* 30 to <45ml/min/1.73m2, a qualifying biopsy performed within 2 years with < 50% tubulointerstitial fibrosis is required.~* For patients with eGFR* 20 to <30ml/min/1.73m2, a qualifying biopsy performed at any time.~In all cases,...

title: RapidMeta Renal | Iptacopan (Factor B Inhibitor) in IgA Nephropathy v1.0
